_law: L5 founder-gated. Agents may ADD checks via PR; never weaken or delete a failing check.

render_integrity.role: Any human with eyes — catches what static generators leak

checks.name: placeholder_counter
checks.why: Em-dash stats read as zero proof on a proof-branded site.

checks.name: broken_internal_anchor
checks.structural: every href=#x must have matching id=x on page

buyer_founder.role: Startup founder with budget, 90 seconds of patience

checks.name: mailto_cta_on_money_page
checks.structural: primary CTA on pricing/pilot pages resolves to mailto:
checks.why: mailto = no intake, no receipt, no funnel.

checks.name: cta_count_above_fold
checks.structural: count distinct CTAs in hero; flag if > 3

checks.name: stable_cta_triad_homepage
checks.structural: homepage must contain Apply for pilot, Request Trust Brief, Start sandbox
checks.why: NF UI build law — three stable entry paths; P2 until founder copy verdict (UPG-NF-PUB).

checks.name: legal_pages_exist
checks.structural: privacy + terms reachable from footer, return 200
checks.why: Instant procurement fail without legal pages.

checks.name: entity_consistency
checks.structural: legal entity name identical on every page footer

checks.name: internal_orphans
checks.structural: flag crawled pages with 0 inbound internal links

nav_coherence.role: Returning visitor building a mental map

checks.name: nav_fingerprint_limit
checks.structural: max 2 nav fingerprints site-wide; disk uses assets/partials/header.html SSOT
checks.why: Two brains on one domain confuses buyers.

checks.name: header_partial_golden_sha
checks.structural: header partial sha256 matches pricing-table golden

deploy_integrity.role: Deploy boundary — disk vs live vs denylist

checks.name: spa_fallback_detect
checks.structural: same body sha256 as homepage on non-home path => SPA_FALLBACK row, excluded from pass math

checks.name: denylist_path_not_html
checks.structural: crawl must not treat PUBLIC_OUTPUT_DENYLIST probe paths as buyer HTML

receipt_hygiene.role: Audit output must not leak founder machine paths

checks.name: no_local_path_in_public_html
checks.why: Founder path leaks in public HTML or receipts.

checks.name: positioning_single_sentence
checks.llm: Can a stranger state what Noetfield sells in one sentence after the hero? Score 0-5.

ai_language_hygiene.role: AI/agent language cleanup — maps positioning to machine-enforced www hygiene

checks.name: invitation_copy_on_buyer_surface
checks.regex: (?i)design partner|you(?:'|')re invited|become a (?:design )?partner|join our (?:beta|pilot) program|limited spots
checks.why: Invitation funnels read as ungoverned lead gen — NF UI build law bans them.

checks.name: founder_jargon_on_public_html
checks.why: Founder factory language on buyer surfaces — unclear to regulated buyers.

checks.name: unsafe_automation_promise
checks.regex: (?i)fully autonomous|zero human(?: oversight)?|set and forget|100% automated compliance|guaranteed compliant
checks.why: Unsafe automation wording — conflicts with blocked/allowed/receipted posture.

checks.name: fake_authority_claim
checks.why: Authority claims without honest scope or receipt — public-risk.

checks.name: conflicting_price_band
checks.why: Conflicting commercial decisions across hubs — same as BF-2, tagged for cleanup lens.

checks.name: unverified_public_risk_claim
checks.why: Public-risk claims without claim-evidence matrix backing.
